name: io.github.trellislabs-hq/fooddata-central-mcp
description: USDA FoodData Central: food search, nutrition data, and a quality-first find_food tool

environmentVariables.name: FDC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: USDA FoodData Central API key. Get a free key at https://fdc.nal.usda.gov/api-guide. DEMO_KEY works for testing (30 req/hr limit).
